titleStmt.title: SII 20.180: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 180. (B.K. No. 43 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the temple of Śivaliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1114, Paridhāvi, Pushya, ba. 10, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti. The date is irregular. The tithi given corresponds to A.D. 1192, December 21, when the week day was Thursday and the saṁkrānti did not occur.

The inscription states that Mahāpradhāna Sōyidēva-daṇḍanāyaka who was incharge of mēlāḷke made a gift of income from Kuṁbiṭṭage, a village in Kummasi-30 included in Tarddavāḍi-1000 division (kampaṇa), to Sātimayya, the ācharya of Hiriya-maṭha of Svayaṁbhu Sōmanāthadēva, for the benefit of the temple of Māṇikēs11vara and for maintaining eight brahmapuris, etc.
The king is stated to be ruling from Dēvagiri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī Ōṁ nama śivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁ
bha(ṁ) mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpa cakra vartti
jai(yi)tugipāḷadēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrā kkartāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire dēvagiriya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyutta
mire tatupādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati
bāhattaraniyōgādhipati hoyisaṇadiśāpaṭṭanuṁ kaḷacuryyarājyanirmmūḷana yā
davarājyasamuddharaṇaṁ śrīmatu rāyadaṁḍanātha nārāyaṇaṁ
sōyidēvadaṁḍanāyakaruṁ Eḷamēlalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire tatuprastāvadoḷu sakavarṣa 1114 keneya paridhāvi saṁva
tsarada puśya bahuḷa 10 Ādityavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti pu(ṁ)ṇyatithiyaṁ
du ta(ṁ)mma hesara māṇikēśvaradēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpadīpa nai
vēdya tāṁbūḷakkaṁ rājaguru kā(ṁ)ṇva Upādhyāyaru mukhyavāgi yeṁṭu bra
hmapuri vṛttiyiṁtinitakkaṁ tarddhavāḍi sāsirada kaṁpaṇaṁ ku(ṁ)mmasimūva
ttaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ kuṁbiṭṭageya mēlāḷkeymaṁ grāmapaṁcaka ba(ṁ)ṇnigedeṟe
kuṇike kiṟukuḷāyadāya sahita yiṁtinituvaṁ svasti yamaniya
māsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭāṇajapasamādhiśī
(śī)laguṇasaṁpannaruṁ budhajanamanōvāṁtsitaphaḷasamutupa(ṁ)nnaruṁ dīnā
nātha jaṭhararucapāvakanivāraṇa nijasamayaśaraṇaikarakṣadakṣananavaratasubhikṣi
ta paṁḍitacūḍāmaṇigaḷuṁ śiṣṭajanaciṁtāmaṇigaḷappa kaḍalevāḍada śrīsvayaṁbhu sō
manāthadēvara hiriya maṭhadācāryya sātimayyaṁgaḷa kālaṁ karcci dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭhirvva rṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . svattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pūrvvadattānupālana pūrvva
harēṇa svadattaṁ viphaḷaṁ bhavētu . madvaṁśajā paramahīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapēta manasā
saha bhuvi bhāvi bhūpā mayā viracitāṁjaḷirēṣa mūrdni . dēvabrahma
svaha(hvā)nāṁ nāhanāni mahīpatē yuddhakālē pralīyaṁtē karaṁ yathā .This and the previous verse are faulty.
Digital edition of SII 20.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
